name: Received at Station
description: Document physically received and registered at this station.

name: Transfer Out
description: Document dispatched from this station to another.

name: Transfer In
description: Document received from another station. Completes a Transfer Out.

name: Requisition
description: Request that a document held at another station be sent here.

name: Document Handover
description: Document handed over to the verified owner.

name: Disposal
description: Document permanently removed from custody (fake, damaged, or unclaimed after expiry).

name: Return After Failed Delivery
description: Document returned to station after a failed delivery or no-show.

name: Location Audit
description: Periodic confirmation that this document is physically present at this station.

name: Condition Update
description: Record updated physical condition of the document (e.g. water damage, torn).
